subcodes.first_line: O Jamálu'd-Dín! Upon thee be the Glory of God, the True Sovereign, the Manifest One. Praise be unto God for the spreading abroad of the utterance of the Purpose of all the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جمال الدین علیک بهاء الله الملک الحق المبین لله الحمد بنشر بیان مقصود عالمیان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
